character.name: Create a professional 64x64 pixel
character.prompt: Create a professional 64x64 pixel art sprite of a Frost Giant from Marvel Comics for a 2D Tower Defense/RPG game. Use the classic Jotunheim Frost Giant appearance from Marvel Comics, not a specific named character. A towering humanoid with an extremely muscular build, icy blue skin, glowing bright blue eyes, long dark blue hair, and a thick braided beard. The face is rugged with sharp features, pronounced brow ridges, large fangs protruding slightly from the mouth, and a fierce expression. Wear primitive armor made of dark leather, fur, and weathered steel, including a heavy fur shoulder mantle, leather straps across the chest, armored bracers, a thick belt with metal plates, a fur kilt, and heavy leather boots trimmed with white fur. Hold a massive ice-forged battle axe with a dark metal handle and a glowing translucent blue blade resting beside the body. Stand in a powerful combat-ready stance with legs apart and both hands gripping the axe. Use icy blue skin, dark blue hair, white fur, brown leather, dark steel, glowing blue eyes, and subtle frost-colored highlights. Professional high-quality pixel art with clean outlines, strong shading, high contrast, crisp silhouette, consistent lighting from the upper left, and excellent readability at small size. Transparent background, centered character, no text, no UI, no logos, no extra characters, and no visual effects. The final image must be a single game-ready 64x64 pixel sprite.
